static_proof.tests: 12/12 pass in packages/db/src/pick-foreign-keys.test.ts — 6 new tests covering SGO-format market key derivation (nba-spread/ml/total, nfl-spread), Soccer/Tennis normalization, and market-prefix fallback path

queries.description: UTV2-217: submitted pick surfaces in DB within 5 seconds — INSERT via atomic submission RPC, SELECT to confirm presence
UTV2-920: invalid atomic submission rolls back — submission_events row absent after invalid submission
UTV2-920: invalid atomic delivery confirmation rolls back outbox status, receipt, lifecycle, and audit writes
UTV2-920/UTV2-996: invalid atomic settlement writes no settlement; re-settling creates correction chain
UTV2-883: no duplicate participants for same external_id and sport — unique constraint verified

root_cause_summary: deriveSportId() had an early-return guard (if (!marketTypeId) return null) before the market-string prefix checks. SGO-format market keys (nba-spread, nba-ml, nba-total) are not in ALTERNATE_MARKET_TYPE_IDS so deriveMarketTypeId() returns null, causing the early-return to fire before the market-prefix fallback. Secondary bug: normalizeSportId used toUpperCase() against a mixed-case CANONICAL_SPORT_IDS set, breaking Soccer/Tennis.

db_query_evidence.note: All 1196 null picks are synthetic test artifacts (source=null, empty metadata). Zero board-construction picks exist post-cutover; last board run was 2026-05-20.
db_query_evidence.events_sport_id_format: canonical short IDs (NBA, MLB, NHL) — not compound SGO keys
